news.headline: ROHM introduces TVS diodes for high-speed CAN FD in vehicles, low capacitance design, high surge current rating.
news.summary: A newly designed low-capacitance system aims to prevent signal degradation in automotive electronic devices. The system boasts a high surge current rating, ensuring enhanced protection for these devices. This design feature is critical as it helps maintain signal integrity in the face of potential electrical disturbances. The improved low-capacitance setup helps safeguard automotive electronics by offering protection against surges, making it a valuable asset for maintaining optimal performance and durability.

news.headline: US API Gasoline Stock Change (Tentative) Actual 2.832M (Forecast -, Previous -2.507M)
US API Distillate Stock Change (Tentative) Actual -2.689M (Forecast -, Previous -0.59M)
US API Cushing Stock Change Actual 1.684M (Forecast -, Previous 0.407M)
US API Crude Oil Stock Change Actual 3.339M (Forecast 2.2M, Previous 9.043M)
Salesloft wins G2's 2025 Best Software Awards for Best Software Companies and Sales Software Products. AI aids in closing deals.
news.summary: Salesloft, a top Revenue Orchestration Platform, has been recognized in customer-driven rankings by G2 for its role in assisting revenue teams in utilizing artificial intelligence to coordinate their efforts and finalize more deals. The rankings emphasize Salesloft's impact in aiding B2B organizations in generating lasting revenue growth. This recognition was announced on February 19, 2025, in Atlanta.

news.headline: IRS to begin laying off roughly 6,000 employees on Thursday — New York Times
Ideagen wins multiple awards in 2025 Best Software Awards for Best Governance, Risk & Compliance and Best Financial Services.
news.summary: Ideagen, based in Nottingham, England, has been recognized as one of the top companies by G2, a prestigious accolade for their Governance, Risk & Compliance and Financial Services software products. The company has been named among the best software companies in the EMEA region, showcasing their excellence and innovation in the industry. This acknowledgment highlights Ideagen's commitment to providing high-quality solutions in the market, solidifying their position as a leading player.

news.headline: Dynavax reiterates board change underway, emphasizes value creation strategy. (Characters: 78)
news.summary: Dynavax Technologies Corporation, based in Emeryville, California, confirmed on Feb. 19, 2025, that significant changes in its board are already in progress. Dynavax, listed on Nasdaq as DVAX, specializes in developing and selling advanced vaccines, and is currently in the commercial stage. The company emphasized that the ongoing board alterations are of great importance for its operations.

news.headline: $81.5B lawsuit filed by Nigeria against Binance exchange as money supply (M2) rose 17% in January 2025, impacting currency value.
news.summary: In January 2025, Nigeria's M2 money supply surged by 17% year-on-year, leading to a depreciation in the currency's value.

news.headline: Texas CHIPS Act awards $23 million to Silicon Labs for R&D advancements in Austin, supporting wireless innovation.
news.summary: Funds from the Texas Semiconductor Innovation Fund will be allocated to support research and development in wireless technology in Texas. This initiative aims to maintain Texas' position as a frontrunner in next-generation technology. On February 19, 2025, Silicon Labs, a prominent player in secure and smart wireless technology, announced this development. This move is set to bolster advancements in the field and ensure Texas remains at the forefront of technological innovation.

news.headline: Increase in HVACR technician demand by 9% through 2033. Universal Technical Institute-Orlando to offer HVACR program in March.
news.summary: The need for HVACR technicians is projected to increase by 9% until 2033. In Orlando, Florida, Universal Technical Institute-Orlando is launching a new Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning, and Refrigeration (HVACR) program starting in March. This move comes as a response to the growing demand for skilled professionals in the field. The new program aims to cater to this demand and provide students with the necessary training to pursue a career in HVACR.

news.headline: Estrella Immunopharma, Inc. receives Buy rating with $16.00 12-month price target from D. Boral Capital.
news.summary: Estrella Immunopharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Emeryville, California, recently received coverage from D. Boral Capital LLC, an investment bank that provided a Buy rating for Estrella. The company's stocks are listed as NASDAQ: ESLA and ESLAW. Estrella is currently focused on developing targeted ARTEMIS® T-cell therapies for CD19 and CD22 to address cancer and autoimmune diseases. The investment bank has set a 12-month target price of $16.00 for Estrella's stocks. This coverage highlights the potential growth and value of Estrella Immunopharma, Inc.

news.headline: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) to hold annual stockholders meeting on May 21, 2025 in Corydon, Ind.
news.summary: In Corydon, Indiana, on February 19, 2025, First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ:FCAP), the parent company of First Harrison Bank, disclosed the scheduling of its upcoming annual stockholders meeting set for Wednesday, May 21, 2025.

news.headline: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. reported a $100.7 million net loss for Q4 2024, $221.3 million for the full year.
news.summary: In New York, Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: CMTG) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company reported a GAAP net loss of $100.7 million and $221.3 million, with corresponding losses per share of $0.72 and $1.60 for the quarter and full year. Distributable Loss, a non-GAAP financial metric, amounted to $83.2 million and $95.7 million, translating to $0.59 and $0.67 per share for the quarter and year, respectively.

news.headline: Orion S.A. reports: Q4 '24 Net sales $434.2M (-$34M YoY); Net income $17.2M (+$12.3M); diluted EPS $0.30 (+$0.22). Adjusted EPS $0.35 (+$0.18); Adjusted EBITDA $61.7M (-$4.9M).
news.summary: Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC), a specialty chemical company based in Houston, reported its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company recorded net sales of $434.2 million, a decrease of $34.0 million compared to the previous year. However, net income for the quarter stood at $17.2 million, showing an increase of $12.3 million year over year. Diluted earnings per share (EPS) were reported at $0.30, up by $0.22 year over year, while adjusted diluted EPS came in at $0.35, an increase of $0.18 year over year. Adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) totaled $61.7 million, reflecting a decrease of $4.9 million compared to the previous year.

news.headline: First Quantum Minerals raises maximum tender amount for 6.875% Senior Notes due 2027 in cash tender offer.
Redesigned 2025 Chevy Colorado offers enhanced capabilities through Carl Black Chevy Buick GMC in Kennesaw, GA.
news.summary: Kennesaw, GA dealership Carl Black Chevy Buick GMC is showcasing comprehensive information on the impressive mid-size pickup truck, the 2025 Chevy Colorado. In a recent announcement on February 19, 2025, the dealership located near Atlanta, GA, expressed enthusiasm in presenting detailed specifications, features, and capabilities of the vehicle.

news.headline: W&T Offshore, Inc. will release Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Feb. 19, 2025. Trading under NYSE: WTI.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE: WTI) disclosed the schedule for its upcoming earnings report and conference call for the fourth quarter and the entirety of 2024.

news.headline: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) declares $0.29/share quarterly dividend, payable on March 28, 2025 to shareholders as of March 14.
news.summary: CORYDON, Indiana - On February 19, 2025, First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per common stock share, as confirmed by Michael C. Frederick, the President and CEO. Shareholders as of March 14, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: WestBond reports Quarter ending Dec 31, 2024; Loss per share corrected to (-$0.001) not (-$001).
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, WestBond Enterprises Corporation (TSX-V: WBE) issued a correction stating that the loss per share is -$0.001, not -$001 as previously indicated. This correction was made in a release in Delta, British Columbia.

news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. plans public offering of common stock (Nasdaq: INBS). No assurance on completion or terms.
news.summary: In New York on February 19, 2025, Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (Nasdaq: INBS), a medical technology firm specializing in intelligent, fast, non-invasive testing solutions, has disclosed the initiation of an underwritten public offering involving shares of its common stock. All the common stock shares in question are being put forth by Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. The realization of this offering is dependent on market conditions, with no guarantees on its completion timing, size, or terms.

news.headline: Blue Owl Capital Corp. reports Q4 net investment income/share of $0.47 and net asset value/share of $15.26.
news.summary: Blue Owl Capital Corporation disclosed its financial performance for the full year and fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the Company reported a net investment income ("NII") per share of [specific number not provided]. The Company's stock is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol OBDC.

news.headline: Monster Energy drivers Riley Herbst, Ty Gibbs, & Tyler Reddick gear up for Daytona 500 action with high horsepower.
news.summary: Monster Energy and The Beast are prepared for an electrifying showdown on the iconic 31-degree banks of The Great American Race. Scheduled for the weekend, Monster Energy and The Beast NASCAR Cup drivers will be revving up the excitement with their high-octane performance. Watch as they dominate the tracks with their powerful horsepower and bring the thrill to spectators. The event is set to take place on February 14, 2025, in Corona, California. Stay tuned for an adrenaline-pumping display of speed and skill as these drivers compete for victory.

news.headline: Liberty Latin America reveals Q4 and FY 2024 results, with CEO mentioning investments in networks, seeing growth in broadband and postpaid mobile subscribers.
news.summary: In Denver, Colorado, Liberty Latin America Ltd. (NASDAQ: LILA and LILAK, OTC Link: LILAB) released its Q4 and FY results for the period ending December 31, 2024. CEO Balan Nair noted growth in broadband and postpaid mobile subscribers due to increased investments in networks and products. The company reported successful operational execution and cost efficiencies in 2024.

news.headline: Blockchain Association CEO from Bloomberg discusses optimism on crypto regulation.
CVR Partners files annual report for fiscal year 2024; manufacturer of fertilizer products, ticker symbol NYSE: UAN.
news.summary: Sugar Land, Texas - On February 19, 2025, CVR Partners, LP (NYSE: UAN), a company specializing in manufacturing ammonia and urea ammonium nitrate ("UAN") solution fertilizers, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 10-K for the period concluding on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: Innovative Industrial Properties' 2024 total revenue: $308.5M. Net income to shareholders: $159.9M. Focus on US cannabis.
news.summary: In San Diego, Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE: IIPR) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding December 31, 2024. The company reported total revenues of $308.5 million for the entire year. Moreover, net income available to common stockholders stood at $159.9 million, equivalent to $5.52 per share. IIP is recognized as the sole real estate entity listed on the New York Stock Exchange that concentrates on the regulated U.S. cannabis sector.

news.headline: Armstrong World Industries (NYSE: AWI) declares $0.308 dividend per share, to be paid on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Armstrong World Industries, Inc. revealed that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.308 per share for common stockholders. This leading company in innovative architectural solutions for interiors and exteriors, such as ceilings and metal solutions, announced that the dividend will be distributed on March 20, 2025. Stockholders recorded as of the end of March 6, 2025, will be eligible to receive the dividend.

news.headline: Trump suggests tariffs, Musk's X aims for $44B valuation in tech news.
news.summary: A recent report shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement from the previous year when the rate was at 5.2%. Additionally, the economy has added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, contributing to the overall positive trend. Experts predict that this upturn is a result of various government initiatives aimed at boosting employment and stimulating economic growth. Business sectors such as technology, healthcare, and finance have seen the most growth in job opportunities. Despite these positive developments, concerns remain about wage disparities and underemployment in certain regions. The government has announced plans to introduce further measures to address these issues and sustain the current economic momentum.

news.headline: S&P 500 hits all-time high close in latest market update.
Mining company FQM raises $1 billion in senior notes offering.
Borr Drilling Limited declares $0.02 per share cash distribution for Q4 2024 to shareholders of record on March 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on February 19, 2025, Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a cash distribution of paid-in capital amounting to US$0.02 per share for the last quarter of 2024. This distribution will be given to shareholders listed on March 3, 2025.

news.headline: Coeur Mining, Inc. reports Q4 2024 revenue of $305M, $64M cash flow, and $38M net income from continuing operations.
news.summary: In Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. disclosed its fourth-quarter 2024 financial outcomes today. The report includes revenue totaling $305 million and $64 million in cash flow from operational activities. The Company recorded GAAP net income from continuing operations at $38 million, equivalent to $0.08 per share. In adjusted figures, Coeur reported an EBITDA of $116 million, $79 million in cash flow from operating activities before adjustments in working capital, and net income from cont.

news.headline: Valaris reported Q4 2024 results with fleetwide revenue efficiency of 96%. Safety awards achieved in 2024.
news.summary: Bermuda-based Valaris Limited (NYSE: VAL) revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. CEO Anton Dibowitz stated that the company maintained strong operational and financial performance, attaining a fleetwide revenue efficiency of 96% in Q4 and 97% for the entire year. Additionally, Valaris excelled in safety in 2024, receiving safety accolades from the IADC and the Center.

news.headline: American States Water Company (NYSE:AWR) reports Q4 2024 EPS of $0.75, up from $0.55 in Q4 2023, citing an increase of $0.20 per share.
news.summary: In San Dimas, California, American States Water Company (NYSE:AWR) announced their quarterly results for the period ending December 31, 2024. They reported a rise in diluted earnings per share from $0.55 in the same period of 2023 to $0.75 in 2024, marking a $0.20 increase per share. This change was influenced by the final decision in the electric general rate case that was implemented in the fourth quarter of 2024. The decision led to retroactive new rates applied for the entirety of 2023 and the subsequent year.

news.headline: Lincoln Electric Board declares $0.75 quarterly dividend per share. Payable on April 15, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Cleveland-based company Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) recently declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.75 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on April 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. Lincoln Electric is a prominent player in the global market for advanced arc welding solutions, automated joining, assembly, and cutting systems, plasma and oxy-fuel cutting equipment, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: RYAM to release Q4 2024 earnings on March 5, 2025. Conference call on March 6 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Visit www.RYAM.com for more info.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Rayonier Advanced Materials (NYSE: RYAM) is set to announce its fourth quarter 2024 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. A conference call and live webcast to discuss these results will be held at 9:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, March 6, 2025. Interested parties can find supplemental materials and access the live audio webcast at www.RYAM.com. A replay of the webcast will also be available on the company’s website shortly after the call. Investors are encouraged to participate in this event.

news.headline: Nordson Corp. reports $615M in sales for Q1 2025 (down from $633M), with net income of $95M and earnings per share of $1.65.
news.summary: Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) released its fiscal first quarter results ended on January 31, 2025. Sales for the quarter stood at $615 million, showing a decrease from the previous year's first quarter sales of $633 million. The sales for Q1 2025 were boosted by an 8% positive impact from acquisitions but were partially offset by a 9% decrease in organic sales and a 2% negative impact due to currency translation. Net income for the quarter was $95 million, resulting in $1.65 earnings per diluted share, in contrast to the previous year's first quarter.

news.headline: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. reported full year 2024 net earnings of $1.22B and adjusted EBITDA of $2.28B.
news.summary: In Northbrook, Illinois, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), a key global producer of hydrogen and nitrogen products, has released its financial results for the full year and fourth quarter as of December 31, 2024. The highlights include net earnings of $1.22 billion, equal to $6.74 per diluted share, EBITDA of $2.33 billion, and adjusted EBITDA of $2.28 billion for the full year 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, net earnings amounted to $328 million, or $1.89 per diluted share, with EBITDA of $582 million.

news.headline: Syntheia Corp. signs first enterprise deal with Van-Fort Ontario to use AI agent for Nunavut Help Desk.
news.summary: In Toronto, Syntheia Corp. (CSE: SYAI), a prominent provider of conversational AI solutions for managing inbound telephone calls, has secured its initial commercial enterprise deal with Van-Fort Ontario. The agreement entails utilizing Syntheia for their Nunavut Help Desk project, with AssistantNLP serving as the primary agent for fielding inbound calls from around 300 government employees.

news.headline: Stock markets rise with Dow Jones up, S&P 500 at new high post release of Fed minutes. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Following the release of the Fed minutes, there was an increase in the major indexes. The Dow Jones saw a rise as the S&P 500 closed at a new high. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: American Water reports Q4 2024 earnings of $1.22/share, up from $0.88/share in 2023. Full year earnings in 2024 were $5.39/share, up from $4.90/share in 2023. CEO to retire in May.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced their fourth quarter 2024 earnings at $1.22 per share, a notable increase from $0.88 per share in 2023. The full year earnings for 2024 were reported at $5.39 per share, up from $4.90 per share in 2023. The company expressed satisfaction in achieving industry-leading earnings and dividend growth. A significant investment of $3.3 billion was made in regulated operations in 2024, primarily focused on infrastructure renewal.

news.headline: Commerce Agency plans to dismiss a large number of chip and AI employees.
Kaiser Aluminum Corp releases 2024 Q4 and FY financial findings.
Host Hotels & Resorts reports $1.5 billion acquisitions, 2.1% RevPAR growth, $900 million net senior notes issuance in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, acquisitions totaling $1.5 billion were successfully finalized. Throughout the full year, there was a 2.1% growth in Comparable Hotel Total RevPAR. Furthermore, a balanced maturity schedule was achieved by issuing $900 million in senior notes during the year.

news.headline: Ansys reveals Q4 and FY 2024 financial performance with strong numbers.
ANI Pharmaceuticals will present at 2 upcoming conferences in March. Nikhil Lalwani, CEO, to attend. (Numbers: Feb 19, 2025, Nasdaq: ANIP)
news.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Princeton, New Jersey, disclosed on February 19, 2025, that its President and CEO, Nikhil Lalwani, along with other senior executives, will participate in two investor conferences. The Company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ANIP, will be represented at the events to engage with investors.

news.headline: Interpublic Group (NYSE: IPG) to attend Barclays Communications and Content Symposium on February 25, 2025, at 9:50 am ET.
news.summary: On February 25th, 2025, senior management from Interpublic Group (NYSE: IPG) will be speaking at the Barclays Communications and Content Symposium in New York City at 9:50 am EST. The event is anticipated to attract significant attention with industry experts gathering to hear about the company's insights and strategic plans.

news.headline: Ultragenyx grants 23,760 stock units to 10 non-executive officers on Feb. 16, 2025, for new employment inducement.
news.summary: On February 16, 2025, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) granted 23,760 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to 10 newly hired non-executive officers. The awards were approved by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan. This grant date was considered an important inducement for the new employees entering into employment with Ultragenyx in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
